positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a celestial bear silhouette nestled among geometric lunar crescents and constellations. The bear is gentle and wise, symbolizing guardianship. Use a limited palette of deep midnight blue, cosmic indigo, matte silver, and accents of glowing gold leaf. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed with clean negative space for high-contrast apparel printing. The style should mimic modern celestial map art mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock line work, ensuring crisp edges and excellent silhouette integrity. High detail, clean lines, vector-graphic quality.
